name: io.github.matthewdtowles/iwantmymtg-mcp
description: Query Magic: The Gathering cards, sets, and prices and manage your I Want My MTG collection.

environmentVariables.name: IWMM_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Personal IWMM API key (iwm_live_...). Optional; required only for the authenticated tools (anything that reads or changes your own collection). Read-only card, set, and price tools work without it.
